title: DB files not removed if all rows are deleted, even after restart
poc: create table sometable_copy as select * from sometable with no data;
create table sometable as select * from sometable_copy with no data;
create table starships(class string, speed int, flux int);
select * from sometable with no data;
key_bug_features: DB files persist after deleting all rows
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name STRING, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Test Entry');
CREATE TABLE empty_table AS SELECT * FROM test_table WITH NO DATA;
